headline: Wedbush Raises its Price Target on Palo Alto Networks (PANW)
summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 27, 2026, Wedbush raised the firm’s price target on Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) to $300 from $225 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. Wedbush cited increased confidence in the company’s platformization story […]
